sample_requests: Compute a CellRank fate map on a scvelo-processed pancreas AnnData with 0.8*vk + 0.2*ck and predict 4 terminal states
Pull the Beta fate probability into obs['beta_fate'] and plot it on UMAP alongside cluster labels
Build a branch-aware gene-trend plot for Alpha vs Beta with a shared endocrine trunk
Make a multi-module dynamic_heatmap of progenitor + 3 endocrine fates with use_fitted=True
Decide how many macrostates / terminal states to compute on a hematopoietic cohort

validation_budget.skip_reason: OmicVerse-side helpers source-grounded via inspect + direct reads of omicverse/single/dynamic_features.py and omicverse/pl/_branch_streamplot.py + _dynamic_*.py. CellRank is an external dependency (pip install cellrank) whose API is documented from notebook usage cross-checked against published CellRank 2 examples. Pancreas endocrinogenesis is the canonical smoke target; no live smoke run executed.
